context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical knowledge template. Sprint 4 (should-have): a markdown-frontmatter supplements list flattened into FactStore via reconcile (deterministic, dedup-aware, NO judge/LLM), plus `bober medical supplements add|list` subcommands. Re-adding the same supplement+dose is a NOOP via reconcileFact exact-match. Supplements are FactStore facts (scope 'medical'), NOT HealthDataStore lab_results rows.
